## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Why

Explain the problem being solved or the reason for the change.

## Validation

- [ ] `make format`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make hooks-run` or local `lefthook` hooks
- [ ] `make installcheck`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Docs updated when user-facing behavior or operations changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow the repository convention
- [ ] This PR is ready for review
